problem.title: LiTAMIN2 paper-comparable on KITTI Odometry 07 (full, 1101 frames)
problem.question: Does LiTAMIN2 reach the paper-reported RPE 0.42% on KITTI Odometry 07 under the paper-faithful 3 m profile with velocity-model pure-odometry init?

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + covariance (pure odometry, velocity-model)
variants.intent: Direct paper-comparison: 3 m voxel + covariance cost + velocity-model init.
variants.note: Uses velocity-model prediction as scan-to-map initial guess (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + ICP-only (pure odometry)
variants.intent: 3 m voxel with covariance term disabled, pure odometry.
variants.note: Uses velocity-model prediction as scan-to-map initial guess (no GT seed). Covariance-shape term disabled.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast local-map + covariance (pure odometry)
variants.intent: Dogfooding fast profile measured as pure odometry for comparison against paper profile.
variants.note: Uses velocity-model prediction as scan-to-map initial guess (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + covariance (Policy A GT-seeded, reference)
variants.intent: Same paper profile but Policy A GT-seeded — non-comparable to paper, kept as Policy A upper bound.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.
